site_title: Spring Fertility | Expert Egg Freezing & IVF Clinics in CA, OR & NY
meta_description: Spring Fertility offers patient-centric, compassionate, flexible care for IVF, egg and embryo freezing, genetic testing, and LGBTQ+ family-building services.
offer_lines: Spring Fertility | Expert Egg Freezing & IVF Clinics in CA, OR & NY

**Join our IVF & Fertility Care info session on 6/5 [LEARN MORE ![Image 12](blob:http://localhost/f744b2047edb804ede12fb4fdfdbf311)](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/webinar-ivf-fertility-care-info-session-tickets-1344234795459?aff=ebdsoporgprofile)**
pain_points: ###### Whether you’re trying to conceive now and want to learn more about fertility treatments or are interested in preserving your fertility through egg or embryo freezing, we’re here for you.

For every successful pregnancy achieved at Spring, we make a donation to Mama Rescue, which supports women with antenata care visits, access quality care, and get important health information to hospitals.
During your first consultation, your physician reviews your history, answers your questions, and creates a personalized plan based on your goals, timeline, and medical needs.
*   **Support Throughout:** Between appointments, you’ll have direct access to your care team through your patient app.
Your treatment path depends on your age, diagnosis, how long you’ve been trying, and the results of your testing.
You’ll leave with a clear plan and a team who’ll support you through every step.
authority_proof: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyse our traffic.
